vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to complex fastener patterns.
risk.mit: Implement clear assembly instructions and visual aids.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion compatible materials or incorporate thermal expansion joints.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate cooling airflow due to blockage or misalignment of cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Conduct CFD analysis and physical testing to validate airflow.

risk.desc: Risk of environmental damage to sensitive equipment in the equipment bay door.
risk.mit: Implement dust and moisture seals around the equipment bay door.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening fasteners leading to structural damage.
risk.mit: Train assembly personnel on proper torque settings and use torque wrenches.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Structural integrity, aerodynamic profile, control surface integration

physics_paths.path: Wing spar load path from leading edge to trailing edge
physics_paths.description: Loads from wing bending and servo actuation are transferred through the spar to the wing root.
Airflow over the NACA airfoil generates lift and drag forces.
Heat generated from solar radiation is dissipated through the wing surface to the ambient air.
Control surfaces are actuated by servos to change the wing's aerodynamic properties.
Atmospheric pressure acts uniformly on the wing surface.
Human service access for battery replacement and sensor module maintenance.

internal_feature_targets.description: Feature for snap fitting with wing skin

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure spar socket is accurately aligned with wing spar for secure attachment.
Ensure snap fit feature is properly aligned with wing skin for secure engagement.
Ensure control surface cutout is accurately aligned with control surface for smooth actuation.

verification_focus.description: Verify that the load path from wing spar to wing root is continuous and secure.
Verify that the wing surface can effectively dissipate heat generated from solar radiation.
Verify that the control surface can be actuated smoothly without interference.

risk.desc: GPS antenna channel may not be shielded enough from power leads.
risk.mit: Increase shielding around power leads and ensure antenna channel is routed away from power lines.

risk.desc: Potential strain on cables due to tight bends near moving parts.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Telemetry board may not have adequate clearance from walls and moving parts.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around telemetry board and ensure it is mounted on standoffs.

risk.desc: Pitot static port may be exposed to dust and debris during low-altitude flights.
risk.mit: Add a protective shield around the pitot static port to prevent dust and debris ingress.

risk.desc: Power connector may not be easily accessible for field service.
risk.mit: Ensure power connector is located in an accessible area with clear access features.
